name: nimio-player
description: Nimio SLDP 2.0 Player — lightweight JS player built on WebCodecs
author: Dmitrii Shovtiuk <shovtyuk@gmail.com>

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:pkg
scripts.dev:pkg:vite: npm run build:pkg && npm run install:pkg:vite && npm --prefix examples/vite-package run dev
scripts.test:pkg:vite: npm run build:pkg && npm run install:pkg:vite && npm --prefix examples/vite-package run build
scripts.dev:pkg:webpack: npm run build:pkg && npm run install:pkg:webpack && npm --prefix examples/webpack-package run dev
scripts.test:pkg:webpack: npm run build:pkg && npm run install:pkg:webpack && npm --prefix examples/webpack-package run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run test:ci && npm run build:pkg
